nasb.text: Immediately He called them; and they left their father Zebedee in the boat with the hired servants, and went away to follow Him.

esv.text: And immediately he called them, and they left their father Zebedee in the boat with the hired servants and followed him.

cnv.text: 他立即呼召他們。他們撇下父親西庇太和雇工在船上，就跟從他去了。

ccb.text: 便立刻呼召他们。他们就辞别父亲和船上的工人，跟从了耶稣。

csbs.text: 耶稣随即召唤他们。他们就离开了在船上的父亲西庇太和雇工们，并且跟着耶稣去了。
